zh.lifeSummary: 當James Radcliffe於1355年出生在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，他的父親William de  Radcliffe20歲，母親Susan De Legh21歲。他和Joan Tempest至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1409年11月9日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Radcliffe于1355年出生在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，他的父亲William de  Radcliffe20岁，母亲Susan De Legh21岁。他和Joan Tempest至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1409年11月9日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When James Radcliffe was born in 1355, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, his father, William de  Radcliffe, was 20 and his mother, Susan De Legh, was 21. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Tempest. He died on 9 November 1409, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Radcliffe est né en 1355, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de  Radcliffe, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Susan De Legh, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Tempest. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Radcliffe 1355 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de  Radcliffe 20 und seine Mutter Susan De Legh 21. Er hatte mit Joan Tempest mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1409 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Radcliffe è nato il nel 1355 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William de  Radcliffe, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Susan De Legh, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Joan Tempest. Morì il 9 novembre 1409, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Radcliffe, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: James Radcliffeが1355年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで生まれた時，父William de  Radcliffeは20歳，母Susan De Leghは21歳であった。彼はJoan Tempestとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1409年11月9日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Radcliffe(이)가 1355년 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de  Radcliffe(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Susan De Legh(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Joan Tempest(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 11월 9일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Radcliffe nasceu em 1355, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de  Radcliffe, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Susan De Legh, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Joan Tempest. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1409, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Radcliffe родился в 1355 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de  Radcliffe было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan De Legh, 21. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Joan Tempest. Он умер 9 ноября 1409 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Radcliffe nació en 1355, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de  Radcliffe, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Susan De Legh, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Joan Tempest. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1409, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
